login.title: Welcome back
login.homeLink: Use DNS control on all your devices
login.verificationPrompt: We've sent a verification code to {email}. Enter it below to sign in.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.homeLink: Use DNS control on all your devices. After verifying your email, add devices and choose the extension or setup file.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.sentTo: We've sent a verification code to {email}
verifyEmail.waitNote: Wait for a while if you haven't received it, then resend.
verifyEmail.codeSent: Verification code sent! Please check your email.

errors.serverErrorMoment: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.cannotConnect: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
errors.cannotConnectAndTry: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.signInFailed: We couldn't sign you in with those credentials.
errors.signInFailedCheck: We couldn't sign you in. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.createAccountFailed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
errors.createAccountFailedConnection: We couldn't create your account. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.securityVerificationFailed: Security verification failed. Please refresh and try again.
errors.invalidOrExpiredCode: Invalid or expired code. Try again or request a new one.
errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.failedToResendTryAgain: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
